short_text: van Beek to Muzarabani, Caught by Brandon Glover!! Short pitched outside off, Muzarabani top-edges his attempted cut sho
full_text: van Beek to Muzarabani, Caught by Brandon Glover!! Short pitched outside off, Muzarabani top-edges his attempted cut shot and it ends as an easy catch for the fielder at short third. A quality bowling performance from the Dutch.

short_text: van Beek to Chatara, 1 run, pace off length ball, dabbed to the left of short third for a run
full_text: van Beek to Chatara, 1 run, pace off length ball, dabbed to the left of short third for a run

short_text: Bas de Leede to Muzarabani, no run, full and quick on off, Muzarabani edges it towards short third. That'll be a dot bal
full_text: Bas de Leede to Muzarabani, no run, full and quick on off, Muzarabani edges it towards short third. That'll be a dot ball

short_text: Bas de Leede to Chatara, 1 run, nice yorker from de Leede, inside edged onto the boots for a quick run
full_text: Bas de Leede to Chatara, 1 run, nice yorker from de Leede, inside edged onto the boots for a quick run

short_text: Bas de Leede to Chatara, 2 runs, full and straight, Chatara nicely chips it over the bowler's head and that'll be good e
full_text: Bas de Leede to Chatara, 2 runs, full and straight, Chatara nicely chips it over the bowler's head and that'll be good enough for a couple

short_text: Bas de Leede to Chatara, no run, wide and full outside off, a swing and a miss for Chatara
full_text: Bas de Leede to Chatara, no run, wide and full outside off, a swing and a miss for Chatara

full_text: Bas de Leede to Muzarabani, 1 run, full on off, driven towards extra cover for another single

short_text: Bas de Leede to Chatara, 1 run, short outside off, dabbed towards short third. Chatara takes off for the single and then
full_text: Bas de Leede to Chatara, 1 run, short outside off, dabbed towards short third. Chatara takes off for the single and then realises it is straight to the fielder. He gets back but there's a direct hit and the deflection off the stumps allow Zimbabwe to cross over

short_text: Fred Klaassen to Muzarabani, no run, short pitched and angles outside off, Muzarabani looks to run it down but can't con
full_text: Fred Klaassen to Muzarabani, no run, short pitched and angles outside off, Muzarabani looks to run it down but can't connect

short_text: Fred Klaassen to Ngarava, Caught by Myburgh!! Another wide yorker, Ngarava slices his big drive and this time picks out
full_text: Fred Klaassen to Ngarava, Caught by Myburgh!! Another wide yorker, Ngarava slices his big drive and this time picks out the fielder at point. The 38-year-old Myburgh adjusts quickly to hold onto this catch. Nine down for Zimbabwe and out walks Blessing.

short_text: Fred Klaassen to Ngarava, , shorter length and strays well outside off, umpire wides
full_text: Fred Klaassen to Ngarava, , shorter length and strays well outside off, umpire wides

short_text: Fred Klaassen to Ngarava, no run, pace off and pitched up just outside off, Ngarava with a wild swing but can't make any
full_text: Fred Klaassen to Ngarava, no run, pace off and pitched up just outside off, Ngarava with a wild swing but can't make any contact

short_text: Fred Klaassen to Ngarava, no run, wide yorker, Ngarava looks to cut it away but inside edges it to short fine
full_text: Fred Klaassen to Ngarava, no run, wide yorker, Ngarava looks to cut it away but inside edges it to short fine

short_text: Fred Klaassen to Ngarava, , another half volley on off, this time Ngarava lifts his drive over van Beek's head for a max
full_text: Fred Klaassen to Ngarava, , another half volley on off, this time Ngarava lifts his drive over van Beek's head for a maximum. That's one way to ensure the fielders don't get in the way

short_text: Fred Klaassen to Ngarava, 2 runs, superb save!! Half volley on off, Ngarava gives it a big drive to the right of mid-wic
full_text: Fred Klaassen to Ngarava, 2 runs, superb save!! Half volley on off, Ngarava gives it a big drive to the right of mid-wicket. It was looking like a sure boundary but van Beek dives stunningly to his right to save a couple

short_text: Bas de Leede to Ngarava, leg byes, 1 run, once again short pitched to the tall batter, Ngarava misses his pull and the b
full_text: Bas de Leede to Ngarava, leg byes, 1 run, once again short pitched to the tall batter, Ngarava misses his pull and the ball hits his helmet and lobs towards the keeper. They scamper through for the single as Scott Edwards appeals for a caught behind, umpire says nothing doing

short_text: Bas de Leede to Chatara, 1 run, short pitched on off, Chatara with a premeditated dab down to third-man
full_text: Bas de Leede to Chatara, 1 run, short pitched on off, Chatara with a premeditated dab down to third-man

full_text: Bas de Leede to Chatara, no run, pitched up and straight, defended back to the bowler

short_text: Bas de Leede to Jongwe, Caught by van Beek!! The bouncer works one again for Bas de Leede. Short pitched and slower, Jon
full_text: Bas de Leede to Jongwe, Caught by van Beek!! The bouncer works one again for Bas de Leede. Short pitched and slower, Jongwe tries to take it on with a pull in front of square. Easy catch for Logan van Beek at deep mid-wicket

short_text: Bas de Leede to Ngarava, 1 run, fuller and angling on middle from round the wicket, Ngarava tonks towards deep mid-wicke
full_text: Bas de Leede to Ngarava, 1 run, fuller and angling on middle from round the wicket, Ngarava tonks towards deep mid-wicket. Again no timing so just one

full_text: Bas de Leede to Jongwe, 1 run, slower length ball on off, Jongwe heaves it down to long-on. No timing at all, just a single

short_text: van Meekeren to Ryan Burl, Bowled!! Knocked over! Full and straight, Burl gets an inside edge onto the stumps trying to
full_text: van Meekeren to Ryan Burl, Bowled!! Knocked over! Full and straight, Burl gets an inside edge onto the stumps trying to drive. Van Meekeren once again might end as the leading wicket-taker, ends with 3/29.

short_text: van Meekeren to Ryan Burl, no run, nice surprise bouncer. It was the effort ball on the body, Burl ducks down
full_text: van Meekeren to Ryan Burl, no run, nice surprise bouncer. It was the effort ball on the body, Burl ducks down

full_text: van Meekeren to Jongwe, 2 runs, back of a length on the body,

full_text: van Meekeren to Jongwe, no run, full on off, blocked to covers

full_text: Bas de Leede to Jongwe, 1 run, fuller on the pads, Jongwe defends onto his pads and sneaks the quick run

full_text: Bas de Leede to Jongwe, 1 run, on a length on the body, tucked awkwardly towards square leg for a single

full_text: Bas de Leede to Jongwe, no run, full and quick on off, defended to mid-on

short_text: Bas de Leede to Raza, Caught by Fred Klaassen!! Excellent catch, screams Harsha Bhogle on commentary!! Short pitched on
full_text: Bas de Leede to Raza, Caught by Fred Klaassen!! Excellent catch, screams Harsha Bhogle on commentary!! Short pitched on off, Raza takes it trying a big pull. It went a mile in the air, but didn't get the distance. For most part of it, it felt as though Klaassen at long-on had misjudged it, but he steadies to take a superb high catch.

short_text: Bas de Leede to Raza, no run, lovely disguised slower ball outside off, Raza shuffles away and can't reach it in time
full_text: Bas de Leede to Raza, no run, lovely disguised slower ball outside off, Raza shuffles away and can't reach it in time

short_text: Brandon Glover to Raza, 1 run, in the blockhole, better ball from Glover which forces Raza to block to long-on
full_text: Brandon Glover to Raza, 1 run, in the blockhole, better ball from Glover which forces Raza to block to long-on

short_text: Brandon Glover to Raza, , full outside off again, Raza was ready this time and effortlessly lifts his drive to the left
full_text: Brandon Glover to Raza, , full outside off again, Raza was ready this time and effortlessly lifts his drive to the left of extra cover. Finding gaps at ease here...

short_text: Brandon Glover to Raza, no run, pace off outside off, Raza shoulders arms thinking it will be wided but the umpire dosen
full_text: Brandon Glover to Raza, no run, pace off outside off, Raza shoulders arms thinking it will be wided but the umpire dosen't move

short_text: Brandon Glover to Ryan Burl, 1 run, good length on off, slapped to the left of mid-wicket to get off the mark
full_text: Brandon Glover to Ryan Burl, 1 run, good length on off, slapped to the left of mid-wicket to get off the mark

short_text: Brandon Glover to Raza, 1 run, back of a length and chasing Raza, chipped a tad uppishly but falls short of the mid-wick
full_text: Brandon Glover to Raza, 1 run, back of a length and chasing Raza, chipped a tad uppishly but falls short of the mid-wicket fielder. Single taken

short_text: Brandon Glover to Raza, , What a shot!! Back of a length but not enough pace, sits up nicely for Raza to pull easily ove
full_text: Brandon Glover to Raza, , What a shot!! Back of a length but not enough pace, sits up nicely for Raza to pull easily over mid-wicket for a maximum. And that was the longer boundary! Made it look so, so easy...

short_text: Brandon Glover to Raza, , short pitched but too far wide of off stump. Raza dosen't need to play at that
full_text: Brandon Glover to Raza, , short pitched but too far wide of off stump. Raza dosen't need to play at that

full_text: van Beek to Ryan Burl, no run, pulled straight back at the bowler

full_text: van Beek to Ryan Burl, no run, in the blockhole outside off, jammed to mid-off

full_text: van Beek to Ryan Burl, , banged in short and it's too short from van Beek. Nothing doing from Ryan Burl

short_text: van Beek to Milton Shumba, Caught by Myburgh!! Chipped straight to short mid-wicket! A soft dismissal. 133kph, length ba
full_text: van Beek to Milton Shumba, Caught by Myburgh!! Chipped straight to short mid-wicket! A soft dismissal. 133kph, length ball, Shumba is early into his push. Off the face of the bat and it goes straight into the bucket hands of Myburgh. Zimbabwe have now lost half their side.

short_text: van Beek to Milton Shumba, 2 runs, 134kph, away-angler outside off, cut behind square on the off-side for a couple
full_text: van Beek to Milton Shumba, 2 runs, 134kph, away-angler outside off, cut behind square on the off-side for a couple

full_text: van Beek to Raza, 1 run, 136kph, Raza goes hard on the drive and miscues it to long-on for a single

short_text: van Beek to Raza, , harmless short ball, leg-lined, Raza has ample time to pick his spot. Waits and swings hard to pull
full_text: van Beek to Raza, , harmless short ball, leg-lined, Raza has ample time to pick his spot. Waits and swings hard to pull it over deep backward square leg for a 63m six

short_text: van Meekeren to Milton Shumba, no run, with a slip in place, van Meekeren bowls a full delivery to new batter. Pushed ba
full_text: van Meekeren to Milton Shumba, no run, with a slip in place, van Meekeren bowls a full delivery to new batter. Pushed back to the bowler by Milton Shumba

short_text: van Meekeren to Williams, Caught by Max ODowd!! The 48-run stand has been broken. This is a crucial breakthrough. Dug in
full_text: van Meekeren to Williams, Caught by Max ODowd!! The 48-run stand has been broken. This is a crucial breakthrough. Dug in short by van Meekeren and Williams goes after it with a pull shot. Gets a top-edge due to extra bounce. Max O'Dowd moves to his left from deep mid-wicket, settles under it and completes the catch calmly.

short_text: van Meekeren to Raza, 1 run, Raza walks forward and across to bunt it to the right of mid-on
full_text: van Meekeren to Raza, 1 run, Raza walks forward and across to bunt it to the right of mid-on

short_text: van Meekeren to Raza, , quick hands! Bit of width outside off and Raza scythes it fiercely through cover point. Speeds a
full_text: van Meekeren to Raza, , quick hands! Bit of width outside off and Raza scythes it fiercely through cover point. Speeds away to the fence

short_text: van Meekeren to Williams, 1 run, 131kph, short of length ball that holds onto the pitch. Williams stays back to tap it i
full_text: van Meekeren to Williams, 1 run, 131kph, short of length ball that holds onto the pitch. Williams stays back to tap it into the off-side and pops up in the air. Fortunately for him, the ball falls short and wide of the cover fielder

full_text: van Meekeren to Raza, leg byes, 1 run, Raza misses the glance against this in-slanter. Heading down leg and hence no appeal for lbw

full_text: van der Merwe to Raza, 1 run, 94kph, very full, Raza stays leg-side of the ball to drive it to long-off's left

full_text: van der Merwe to Williams, 1 run, 93kph, very full delivery, turned to mid-wicket and van der Merwe is quick to get to the ball

full_text: van der Merwe to Williams, 2 runs, 94kph, quicker one from a good length, Williams wants to work it into the on-side and gets an that eludes the keeper to his left

full_text: van der Merwe to Williams, , van der Merwe isn't happy with that effort from the fielder. Fuller in length and Williams reverse-sweeps it to the left of backward point. The fielder was probably lethargic

full_text: van der Merwe to Williams, no run, away-dart outside off, Williams misses the cut

full_text: Bas de Leede to Williams, 1 run, short delivery, pulled to deep square leg

full_text: Brandon Glover to Raza, no run, swings hard and misses! Short ball and Raza connects with thin air as he goes hard on the pull. The ball bounces over his blade. Guess what, but no one appealed

short_text: Brandon Glover to Raza, 2 runs, slower, fuller and wider at 108kph, Raza throws the kitchen sink and slices it over back
full_text: Brandon Glover to Raza, 2 runs, slower, fuller and wider at 108kph, Raza throws the kitchen sink and slices it over backward point

short_text: Brandon Glover to Raza, , Raza is going after Glover! Dug in short and Raza isn't afraid to take the aerial route. Swive
full_text: Brandon Glover to Raza, , Raza is going after Glover! Dug in short and Raza isn't afraid to take the aerial route. Swivels and hooks it up and above deep square leg - splitting the two fielders (deep mid-wicket and long leg) in the deep. He was on the back foot and did well to elude the sticks

short_text: Brandon Glover to Raza, , 132kph, authoritative strike! Walks forward and smashes this length ball straight of mid-off.
full_text: Brandon Glover to Raza, , 132kph, authoritative strike! Walks forward and smashes this length ball straight of mid-off. Aerial and in the gap

full_text: Brandon Glover to Raza, 2 runs, 134kph, quick hands from Raza to punch this short of length delivery off the back foot to deep cover's right

full_text: Brandon Glover to Raza, no run, 137kph, in-slanting length ball on the stumps, Raza defends into the on-side

full_text: van Beek to Williams, , 134kph, minimum feet movement but Williams has struck this fiercely and into the gap. Full and wide of off, Williams drills it through extra cover

full_text: van Beek to Williams, no run, back of a length, punched to backward point

full_text: van Beek to Williams, 2 runs, 130kph, fullish outside off, slashed through the covers

full_text: van Beek to Williams, no run, short of length outside off, Williams goes for the cut and miscues towards mid-off

full_text: van Meekeren to Raza, no run, 135kph, van Meekeren goes fuller on this occasion, the line is better and raps Raza on the front pad who is half-forward to push/drive. Half an appeal for lbw and the Dutch decide against the review. Was there an inside edge? No, but

full_text: van Meekeren to Raza, , shuffles to glance/flick and misses this in-slanter just down leg, wided

full_text: van Meekeren to Williams, 1 run, 137kph, driven sans any feet movement to the right of mid-off. Roelof van der Merwe scores a direct-hit at the striker's end but Raza is comfortably in

full_text: van Meekeren to Williams, 2 runs, pulled to deep mid-wicket for a brace

full_text: van Meekeren to Williams, no run, back of a length ball, Williams stays leg-side of the ball and misses the glance to get hit high on the pad

full_text: van Meekeren to Williams, 2 runs, 129kph, short again, pulled to deep mid-wicket for a couple

short_text: van Meekeren to Williams, , 131kph, harmless short ball, Williams stands tall and pulls it through square leg. No one's
full_text: van Meekeren to Williams, , 131kph, harmless short ball, Williams stands tall and pulls it through square leg. No one's stopping that

short_text: Brandon Glover to Chakabva, Lbw!! Two drops and Brandon Glover doesn't need the assistance of fielders on this occasion.
full_text: Brandon Glover to Chakabva, Lbw!! Two drops and Brandon Glover doesn't need the assistance of fielders on this occasion. Scrambled seam ball at 138kph, jags in from a fullish length and raps Chakabva's front pad adjacent to the sticks. A mini-shuffling Chakabva played alla round it looking to work it into the on-side. Looked plumb and Zimbabwe don't review it.

short_text: Brandon Glover to Chakabva, no run, 131kph, left alone outside off
full_text: Brandon Glover to Chakabva, no run, 131kph, left alone outside off

short_text: Brandon Glover to Chakabva, no run, outswinger, a watchful leave from Chakabva follows
full_text: Brandon Glover to Chakabva, no run, outswinger, a watchful leave from Chakabva follows

short_text: Brandon Glover to Chakabva, no run, Chakabva looks to cut again, gets an outside edge that just about carries to the kee
full_text: Brandon Glover to Chakabva, no run, Chakabva looks to cut again, gets an outside edge that just about carries to the keeper to dives to his right. Went with both hands but couldn't hold onto it

short_text: Brandon Glover to Chakabva, no run, 132kph, Chakabva flashes his bat on seeing the line outside off. Cut hard and straig
full_text: Brandon Glover to Chakabva, no run, 132kph, Chakabva flashes his bat on seeing the line outside off. Cut hard and straight to backward point. Nice catchable height, but Bas de Leede drops it!

short_text: Brandon Glover to Chakabva, , 131kph, outswinger, too wide outside off, left alone
full_text: Brandon Glover to Chakabva, , 131kph, outswinger, too wide outside off, left alone

full_text: Brandon Glover to Williams, leg byes, 1 run, 133kph, strays onto the pads, Williams is late on the tuck and the ball rolls to square leg off his pad

short_text: Fred Klaassen to Chakabva, no run, 123kph, lbw appeal, struck down. Chakabva misses the glance against this inswinger an
full_text: Fred Klaassen to Chakabva, no run, 123kph, lbw appeal, struck down. Chakabva misses the glance against this inswinger and is rapped on the front leg. Swinging down leg...

short_text: Fred Klaassen to Chakabva, no run, 125kph, shapes in a touch and hits him high on the bat as the ball dies down on the l
full_text: Fred Klaassen to Chakabva, no run, 125kph, shapes in a touch and hits him high on the bat as the ball dies down on the leg-side. Even the bottom hand came off the bat handle

full_text: Fred Klaassen to Chakabva, no run, 127kph, pushed with the swing to short mid-wicket

full_text: Fred Klaassen to Williams, 3 runs, 128kph, full on off and middle, a shuffling Williams clips it through mid-wicket to open his account

full_text: Fred Klaassen to Williams, no run, 128kph, short of length outside off, left alone

short_text: Fred Klaassen to Chakabva, 1 run, 130kph, full and wide of off, Chakabva throws his bat at it and the ball flies off the
full_text: Fred Klaassen to Chakabva, 1 run, 130kph, full and wide of off, Chakabva throws his bat at it and the ball flies off the outer edge. Falls between two converging fielders - backward point and third man

short_text: Brandon Glover to Ervine, Caught by Edwards!! A 135kph, length ball, Ervine shuffles across and walks forward in order t
full_text: Brandon Glover to Ervine, Caught by Edwards!! A 135kph, length ball, Ervine shuffles across and walks forward in order to flick it away into the on-side. The ball balloons up a long way off the leading edge. Edwards waits and waits under the swirling ball and pouches it safely. Zimbabwe lose both their openers!

short_text: Brandon Glover to Ervine, no run, 136kph, good length that comes in with the angle, Ervine is stuck in his crease and is
full_text: Brandon Glover to Ervine, no run, 136kph, good length that comes in with the angle, Ervine is stuck in his crease and is late to close his bat-face. Gets pinned high on the back leg

full_text: Brandon Glover to Ervine, no run, 136kph, full delivery, driven firmly but straight to mid-on

full_text: Brandon Glover to Ervine, no run, 136kph, width served, cut hard but Ervine can't get it past backward point

full_text: Fred Klaassen to Chakabva, no run, 128kph, extra bounce in addition to the inswing, Chakabva misses the flick to get pinned high on the body

short_text: Fred Klaassen to Ervine, 1 run, Ervine walks down the pitch to push/drive and yorks himself in the process. It's the out
full_text: Fred Klaassen to Ervine, 1 run, Ervine walks down the pitch to push/drive and yorks himself in the process. It's the outswinger again and the outside edge eludes a diving second slip fielder to his left

full_text: Fred Klaassen to Ervine, no run, outswinger, fullish and wide of off, a watchful leave from Ervine follows

full_text: van Meekeren to Chakabva, , edged and four! 135kph, full and wide of off, Chakabva throws his bat at it for a drive and gets a fat outside edge that flies over second slip. Runs away to third man for four and he gets off the mark streakily

full_text: van Meekeren to Chakabva, no run, goes away with good bounce from a good length outside off, no shot offered

full_text: van Meekeren to Chakabva, no run, this one swings away outside off, left alone. Two slips in place

short_text: van Meekeren to Madhevere, Bowled!! Knocked him over! Full, quick and straight, Madhevere plays all around it trying to
full_text: van Meekeren to Madhevere, Bowled!! Knocked him over! Full, quick and straight, Madhevere plays all around it trying to flick it away and ends up hearing the death rattle. The seam was pointed towards the slip region but the ball came in with the angle to go through the bat-pad gap, crashes into middle.

short_text: van Meekeren to Ervine, 1 run, opens his bat-face to try and run this length ball down to third man. The ball hits the t
full_text: van Meekeren to Ervine, 1 run, opens his bat-face to try and run this length ball down to third man. The ball hits the top part of the bat due to extra bounce and wide slip half-stops with a dive to his left

full_text: van Meekeren to Ervine, no run, pad-lined, Ervine misses the glance and the ball brushes his pad before going into the keeper's mitts

short_text: van Meekeren to Ervine, , gifts runs does van Meekeren! Inswinger that pitches just outside leg and keeps going down leg
full_text: van Meekeren to Ervine, , gifts runs does van Meekeren! Inswinger that pitches just outside leg and keeps going down leg. The keeper can't stop it and the ball dribbles away to fine leg. Five bonus runs

full_text: Fred Klaassen to Madhevere, no run, shapes into the right-hander on a length and Madhevere accounts for the movement as he watchfull blocks it out

full_text: Fred Klaassen to Ervine, 1 run, another outswinger, Ervine pushes at it and gets an outside edge that rolls past the second slip fielder. Ervine opens his account with a streaky single

full_text: Fred Klaassen to Ervine, no run, lovely delivery! Late away swing from a good length, Ervin expects the ball to come in with the angle and is beaten on the outside edge. Decent carry-through to the keeper

full_text: Fred Klaassen to Madhevere, 1 run, leans forward and pushes this pitched up ball towards mid-off. Madhevere gets off the mark with a quick single

full_text: Fred Klaassen to Madhevere, , fuller and wider, outside the tramline and Madhevere lets it pass for it to be wided

full_text: Williams to Bas de Leede, , steps down and makes contact, this time clears the infield and hits it over the bowler's head. That's the game for Netherlands finally. They have dented Zimbabwe's chances big time...

full_text: Williams to Bas de Leede, no run, quicker delivery, Bas de Leede tries to drive and misses

full_text: Williams to Bas de Leede, no run, spinning away, Bas de Leede swings and misses

full_text: Williams to Bas de Leede, no run, pushed towards cover

full_text: Williams to Bas de Leede, no run, oh Chakabva! He fumbled an easy stumping chance. Bas de Leede didn't even realise the keeper fumbled and almost started to walk back. Chakabva had ages of time. He fumbled twice

full_text: Ngarava to van der Merwe, no run, ! The angle across the right-hander, bounce, movement off the pitch. Too good for van der Merwe, who was totally opened up

full_text: Muzarabani to Edwards, , short and wide again. Oh thank you very much cut shot from Edwards. Beats backward point's dive, no chance

short_text: Muzarabani to Max ODowd, Caught by Milton Shumba!! Short and wide, hit me ball. He did hit it well but straight to deep
full_text: Muzarabani to Max ODowd, Caught by Milton Shumba!! Short and wide, hit me ball. He did hit it well but straight to deep point. One of the cases where he timed it too well. Shumba times his jump to perfection to end a fine innings.

short_text: Jongwe to Max ODowd, 1 run, low full toss, ODowd flicks to deep mid-wicket and keeps stirke
full_text: Jongwe to Max ODowd, 1 run, low full toss, ODowd flicks to deep mid-wicket and keeps stirke

full_text: Jongwe to Max ODowd, , low full toss, ODowd glances away to fine leg and that's his . Anchored the chase from one end to ensure it's a smooth win. Well, Netherlands almost there

full_text: Jongwe to Max ODowd, , low full toss, flicked in the air to deep mid-wicket. Man tries to attack for the catch but takes it on the bounce. Oh a fumble, has let that go right through for four. Poor fielding

full_text: Jongwe to Max ODowd, , that's a no ball around head height. ODowd sits under it. Jongwe apologises. coming up

full_text: Jongwe to Bas de Leede, , nicely played! Bas de Leede gets inside the line of this good length delivery and glances fine, man at fine leg is pretty wide and he can't cut it off

short_text: Ngarava to Ackermann, Caught by Jongwe!! In the air and taken at mid-off. Short of a length delivery angling across, Ack
full_text: Ngarava to Ackermann, Caught by Jongwe!! In the air and taken at mid-off. Short of a length delivery angling across, Ackermann looks to loft this over mid-on, but it bounced and the bat turned in his hands. Sliced to mid-off for an easy catch. Two quick wickets for Zimbabwe, but Netherlands need only 27 more to win.

full_text: Jongwe to Tom Cooper, Caught by Madhevere!! In the airrrr and taken at deep mid-wicket. Oh looks like Madhevere has hurt his left ankle while catching. It got stuck in the grass and looks like he twisted the ankle. Now he is being helped off the field. Short of a length delivery, Cooper pulls, finds the man at deep mid-wicket.

full_text: Jongwe to Max ODowd, 1 run, short of a length delivery just around off stump, ODowd tries to dab it to point, hits the glove. That must have hurt

full_text: Jongwe to Max ODowd, , oh outstanding shot! Use of the feet from ODowd and then a neat lofted drive, great balance and he also holds the pose for the cameras. Mid-off in and it clears them

full_text: Muzarabani to Tom Cooper, , Shot! Back of a length and too close to the body, Cooper reads the length very early and pulls it through mid-wicket for a very flat six. That's more like the Tom Cooper we all know!

full_text: Chatara to Max ODowd, , shorter outside off, ODowd stays tall and pushes it off the backfoot to the right of cover point. Beats the man in the cirlce and then it was always going to run away for four!

full_text: Chatara to Tom Cooper, 1 run, full outside off, Cooper gets a thick outside edge on his drive that runs away towards square third-man

full_text: Chatara to Max ODowd, 1 run, pitched up on middle, ODowd danced down to drive it past the bowler. The big bowler Ngarava dives to his left from mid-on to save three runs for his side

full_text: Chatara to Max ODowd, no run, shorter outside off, cut straight to cover point

short_text: Chatara to Tom Cooper, 1 run, dropped! Full and straight on off, Cooper shuffles closer and drives it hard back to the b
full_text: Chatara to Tom Cooper, 1 run, dropped! Full and straight on off, Cooper shuffles closer and drives it hard back to the bowler. Chatara can't hold onto this low chance to his left, single taken

short_text: Muzarabani to Max ODowd, no run, good length outside off, just teasing ODowd who almost edged that to the keeper
full_text: Muzarabani to Max ODowd, no run, good length outside off, just teasing ODowd who almost edged that to the keeper

short_text: Muzarabani to Tom Cooper, 1 run, good length well outside off, Cooper slashes off the bottom of his bat to beat the seco
full_text: Muzarabani to Tom Cooper, 1 run, good length well outside off, Cooper slashes off the bottom of his bat to beat the second slip fielder and get a single to third-man

short_text: Muzarabani to Tom Cooper, no run, back of a length just outside off, rises on Cooper who adjusts to dab it into the grou
full_text: Muzarabani to Tom Cooper, no run, back of a length just outside off, rises on Cooper who adjusts to dab it into the ground towards gully

short_text: Muzarabani to Tom Cooper, no run, on a length and straight, defended back to the bowler
full_text: Muzarabani to Tom Cooper, no run, on a length and straight, defended back to the bowler

short_text: Muzarabani to Myburgh, Caught by Ryan Burl!! Muzarabani strikes and brings out that biscep flexing celebration! Fuller o
full_text: Muzarabani to Myburgh, Caught by Ryan Burl!! Muzarabani strikes and brings out that biscep flexing celebration! Fuller on off, Myburgh slices his drive and Ryan Burl at point judges well to jump at the right time and hold onto a catch over his shoulders. All the pressure was created by Chatara on ODowd last over, but it is Muzarabani who gets the wicket of ODowd's partner!

short_text: Muzarabani to Myburgh, no run, short pitched and gets to Myburgh quicker than expected. Pulls into the ground towards mi
full_text: Muzarabani to Myburgh, no run, short pitched and gets to Myburgh quicker than expected. Pulls into the ground towards mid-on

short_text: Chatara to Max ODowd, , hard luck Chatara! He's bowled so well throughout this over, just goes a bit fuller outside off
full_text: Chatara to Max ODowd, , hard luck Chatara! He's bowled so well throughout this over, just goes a bit fuller outside off and this time ODowd's drive finds the gap to the left of the point fielder

short_text: Chatara to Max ODowd, no run, good length outside off, ODowd shuffles away for a cut over the infield. Another play and
full_text: Chatara to Max ODowd, no run, good length outside off, ODowd shuffles away for a cut over the infield. Another play and miss. Something has got to give soon here...

short_text: Chatara to Max ODowd, no run, full on off, driven straight to covers
full_text: Chatara to Max ODowd, no run, full on off, driven straight to covers

short_text: Chatara to Max ODowd, no run, good length outside off, shaping away. ODowd once again beaten on the outside edge
full_text: Chatara to Max ODowd, no run, good length outside off, shaping away. ODowd once again beaten on the outside edge

short_text: Chatara to Max ODowd, no run, Chatara shortens the length and a bit closer to the batter outside off. A play and a miss
full_text: Chatara to Max ODowd, no run, Chatara shortens the length and a bit closer to the batter outside off. A play and a miss

short_text: Chatara to Max ODowd, no run, a tad fuller and swinging away outside off. ODowd gives it a charge for a big drive but th
full_text: Chatara to Max ODowd, no run, a tad fuller and swinging away outside off. ODowd gives it a charge for a big drive but the swing takes it away from his arc

short_text: Ngarava to Myburgh, no run, good length and angling onto off. Too close to cut but Myburgh attempts it anyway. Cuts it o
full_text: Ngarava to Myburgh, no run, good length and angling onto off. Too close to cut but Myburgh attempts it anyway. Cuts it onto the pitch

short_text: Ngarava to Max ODowd, 1 run, short pitched on the body, pulled uppishly and lands between square leg and mid-on. Single
full_text: Ngarava to Max ODowd, 1 run, short pitched on the body, pulled uppishly and lands between square leg and mid-on. Single taken

short_text: Ngarava to Max ODowd, no run, fuller and straight, defended
full_text: Ngarava to Max ODowd, no run, fuller and straight, defended

short_text: Ngarava to Myburgh, 1 run, length ball outside off, cut towards the right of backward point where Burl makes a diving st
full_text: Ngarava to Myburgh, 1 run, length ball outside off, cut towards the right of backward point where Burl makes a diving stop. He didn't want the run but ODowd forces him. Gets home in time as the direct hit was off its mark at the bowler's end

short_text: Ngarava to Myburgh, , short pitched and too much width, Myburgh plays a lovely slice cut and it stands flush onto the bo
full_text: Ngarava to Myburgh, , short pitched and too much width, Myburgh plays a lovely slice cut and it stands flush onto the boundary ropes. First six of the chase!

short_text: Ngarava to Myburgh, no run, fuller on off, pushed towards points
full_text: Ngarava to Myburgh, no run, fuller on off, pushed towards points

full_text: Chatara to Max ODowd, no run, good length outside off, a bit of shape away. ODowd makes a late decision to leave it alone

full_text: Chatara to Max ODowd, no run, back of a length outside off, ODowd took a stab at it and narrowly missed. A half appeal for caught behind from the keeper

full_text: Chatara to Max ODowd, no run, good length outside off, no shot offered

full_text: Chatara to Max ODowd, , back of a length on off, ODowd stands tall and pushes it in the gap between point and covers. Runs away for four

full_text: Chatara to Max ODowd, no run, full on off, a bit of shape leaving the batter. Pushed towards point
